Quarter: The specific quarter of the year in which the wellness seminar was held.
Seminar_Title: Title of the wellness seminar held during the specified quarter.
Total_Employees: The total number of employees at Elexion Automotive.
Attendees: The number of employees who attended the wellness seminar.
Attendance_Rate: The percentage of total employees who attended the wellness seminar.
Location: The location where the wellness seminar was held.
